message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
autonumber off

participant "LoaderPlugin" as LoaderPlugin
participant "ContentServer" as ContentServer
participant "FS" as FS

LoaderPlugin -> ContentServer : LoadBundleIndexes()
activate ContentServer

rectangle [for each index file] {
  rectangle loop {
    ContentServer -> FS : ReadFile()
    activate FS
    FS --> ContentServer
    deactivate FS
    note right of ContentServer: parse ContentBundleIndex instances,\nfill mountpoint mappings
    ContentServer <- ContentServer
  }
}

deactivate ContentServer
ContentServer --> LoaderPlugin

@enduml
```
